channel.title: CAD on YiSheng's secret garden
channel.description: Recent content in CAD on YiSheng's secret garden

item.title: Tinkercad
item.description:
slug: Tinkercad

Introduction to Tinkercad — Online 3D Software

Link: https://www.tinkercad.com/login?next=%2Fthings%2FgyAdNPIC5oD-incredible-leelo%2Fedit

First-time users!

Click Personal account.

Features:

  1. Design Arduino circuits
  2. 3D printing model design

Designing Arduino Circuits

Design the circuit you want to test (this example uses the official sample provided). You can also test the CODE directly.

After registering and logging in to the Tinkercad website, click Circuits, then press Create new circuit:

From the Components panel on the right, drag and drop a small breadboard onto the canvas, and optionally rename it “Breadboard”.
